scripts.docker:build: docker build -f apps/server/Dockerfile --build-arg IMAGE_TAG=ants/server:local --build-arg ANTS_SERVER_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -t ants/server:local .
scripts.docker:build:lite: docker build -f apps/server/Dockerfile --build-arg VARIANT=lite --build-arg IMAGE_TAG=ants/server:local-lite --build-arg ANTS_SERVER_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -t ants/server:local-lite .
scripts.compose:up: ANTS_SERVER_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose -f apps/server/docker-compose.yml up --build
scripts.compose:up:detached: ANTS_SERVER_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose -f apps/server/docker-compose.yml up --build -d
scripts.compose:up:lite: ANTS_SERVER_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose -f apps/server/docker-compose.yml -f apps/server/docker-compose.lite.yml up --build
scripts.compose:up:lite:detached: ANTS_SERVER_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose -f apps/server/docker-compose.yml -f apps/server/docker-compose.lite.yml up --build -d
